# zstack_stack_template (Resource)

Manages a stack template in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the stack template.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the stack template.
- `template_content` (String) The template content.
- `type` (String) The type of the stack template.

### Read-Only

- `md5sum` (String) The MD5 checksum of the template content.
- `state` (Boolean) The state of the stack template.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the stack template.
- `version` (String) The version of the stack template.
